title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council MDRRMC) Resolution No. 2023-15 Dated October 27, 2023, Entitled "resolution Authorizing the Utilization of the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund-continuing Appropriation Amounting to Two Million Pesos (P 2,000,000.00) for the Procurement of Motor Vehicle, in Particular, a Pick-up for Disaster Response and Rescue / Relief Operations." Councilor Benedicto S. Alborida 11/13/2023
